name: Angel O1
name_jp: エンジェル<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｏ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>オー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>１</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ワン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by revealing 1 Level 7 or higher monster from your hand. You can only Special Summon "Angel O1" once per turn this way. While you control this Special Summoned card, you can Tribute Summon 1 Level 7 or higher monster in Attack Position during your Main Phase, in addition to your Normal Summon/Set. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.)
mnst_eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by revealing 1 Level 7 or higher monster from your hand. You can only Special Summon "Angel O1" once per turn this way. While you control this Special Summoned card, you can Tribute Summon 1 Level 7 or higher monster in Attack Position during your Main Phase, in addition to your Normal Summon/Set. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.)
eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by revealing 1 Level 7 or higher monster from your hand. You can only Special Summon "Angel O1" once per turn this way. While you control this Special Summoned card, you can Tribute Summon 1 Level 7 or higher monster in Attack Position during your Main Phase, in addition to your Normal Summon/Set. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.)

sets.set: Egyptian God Deck: Obelisk the Tormentor

action: Reveals your hand for Special Summon
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
misc: Gain this effect once per turn
